title: Corpses Begone
description: Making corpse feels like actual corpses
body:
## ⚠️ Disclaimer

The items **Flesh** and **Cooked Flesh** are mere variations of the vanilla item **Rotten Flesh**. Please do not associate them with anything else.

## 📝 Description

This mod is an add-on 🧩 to the [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse) mod (required dependency).

It makes the corpse from the Corpse mod hittable 💥 (similar to a minecart 🛒). The corpse will be discarded/destroyed after the player hits it multiple times.

The corpse will drop Flesh 🥩 and Bones 🦴 when hit. The flesh can also be cooked 🍳 just like other meats.

👨‍🌾 Villagers will also drop flesh when killed.

![image0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h8ZARAmk/images/dee45d296ee2d55d32c59eba7960bee86b4c1529.png)

🔥 If the cause of death for a corpse was fire, the flesh harvested will be cooked 🍖 automatically. The same rule applies to villagers.

![image1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h8ZARAmk/images/a2e900e7f4d9a42423e7a6ffedde252ecc678abc.png)
